footer.desc: If you have any questions about your order, warranty, or Montero products, we’re here to help.

banner.title: A World Time Watch Inspired by Global Beaches
banner.desc: Crafted for explorers, dreamers, and lovers of the world’s most iconic beaches

about.title: The Story Behind Montero
about.desc: Montero was born from a deep appreciation for the world, its diversity, and the timeless beauty of global coastlines. Each detail of the watch carries inspiration from the beaches that have shaped culture, adventure, and unforgettable memories. From Ibiza to Bali, Miami to Bora Bora, the Montero world-time concept celebrates the connection between people and place. It is more than a watch — it is a reminder that every moment holds a new horizon.

adventure.title: Adventure
adventure.desc: For those who never stop exploring

culture.title: Culture
culture.desc: Celebrating eight iconic beaches across the globe

products.title: Choose Your Montero Edition
products.desc: Montero is available in two collectible editions — each designed with its own identity while sharing the same world-time DNA and craftsmanship.

english.title: English Edition
english.desc: A refined international version with a crisp white & blue dial inspired by modern minimalism.
english.exploreDesc: A refined classic design with modern elegance

arabic.title: Arabic Edition
arabic.desc: A bold blue dial with Eastern Arabic numerals inspired by regional identity and oceanic depth.
arabic.exploreDesc: Distinctively crafted with Eastern Arabic numerals and a bold blue dial

locations.title: The Eight Beaches That Inspired Montero
locations.desc: Each beach was chosen for its cultural significance, beauty, and global reputation — together forming the emotional core of Montero.
locations.bottomDesc: Together, these beaches form Montero’s world map — connecting you to memories, destinations, and future adventures.

vip.title: Join the Montero VIP Club
vip.desc: Our VIP members gain access to exclusive benefits and are part of shaping the future of Montero.

upcoming.title: Upcoming Releases
upcoming.desc: Discover what’s next for Montero. Get early previews and reserve your spot for the next limited edition.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Question
faq.desc: Each beach was chosen for its cultural significance, beauty, and global reputation — together forming the emotional core of Montero.

list.question: Do the watches come with a warranty?
list.answer: Yes, all Montero watches come with an international warranty covering manufacturing defects.

list.question: Are the watches scratch-resistant?
list.answer: Our watches use scratch-resistant sapphire crystal to ensure durability.

list.question: What materials are used to make your watches?
list.answer: We use premium stainless steel, sapphire crystal, and genuine leather straps.

list.question: How can I place an order?
list.answer: Orders can be placed directly through our website during product launches.

subscribe2.desc: Join our mailing list to receive early access, limited-edition alerts, and insider updates directly from the Montero team.
